title: COM Object Hijacking via HKCU Registry
description: Detects COM object hijacking by writing CLSID entries to HKCU\Software\Classes\CLSID. Attackers use this technique to redirect COM object loading to malicious DLLs or executables, achieving stealthy persistence and potential privilege escalation without requiring administrator rights.
falsepositives: Legitimate per-user COM object registration during software installation
